name: Black Basta
description: Black Basta is a major ransomware-as-a-service group that emerged in 2022 and is widely assessed as one of the most significant post-Conti ransomware operations. The group is known for aggressive double extortion campaigns involving enterprise-wide encryption, data theft, and public leak-site pressu
strategic_objectives: Financial extortion through enterprise-wide ransomware deplo
Data theft to increase ransom leverage
Rapid monetization of large enterprise compromise
